capture_metadata.notes: apiyi_ch cross-object citation interleaving and warning citation ordering batch

diagnostics.message: Separator Vapor Outlet is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Trim Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler should remain explanatory context only.
Trim Separator behavior cannot be treated as independently settled while the vapor outlet remains disconnected.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

message.content: {"schema_version":1,"project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-cross-object-warning-citation-ordering-001","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","summary":"针对 Trim Separator (separator-4) 的 vapor 出口流 separator-vapor-41 未连接下游消费端的问题，生成局部占位修复提案，同时保留 Cooler 与 Separator 之间的关联约束作为上下文提示。","answers":[{"text":"检测到 separator-vapor-41 存在未连接下游的严重拓扑错误，已为其生成占位连接提案；同时识别到 cooler-outlet-41 与 separator-4 存在跨对象状态依赖警告，建议在修复拓扑后复核 Cooler 出口条件。","citations":["diag-1","diag-2","diag-3","flowdoc-stream-3","flowdoc-unit-2","snapshot-1"]}],"issues":[{"code":"STREAM_DISCONNECTED","message":"Separator Vapor Outlet 未连接任何下游消费端或出口汇点","severity":"error","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-3"]},{"code":"DOWNSTREAM_SEPARATOR_STATE_DEPENDENT","message":"Trim Separator 在 vapor 出口未连接时无法视为独立稳定","severity":"warning","citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-2"]},{"code":"COOLER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED","message":"Trim Cooler 出口条件可能在下游恢复后发生变化","severity":"warning","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-2"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"kind":"candidate_edit","title":"为 Separator Vapor Outlet 添加下游占位连接","target":{"type":"stream","id":"separator-vapor-41","name":"Separator Vapor Outlet"},"rationale":"separator-vapor-41 当前为悬空流，导致求解器拓扑无效。添加 connection_placeholder 标记待连接下游单元，保留现有压力规格 (146 kPa) 作为边界条件占位，待后续指定具体消费单元或汇点后完成拓扑闭合。","patch":{"connection_placeholder":{"target_unit_id":null,"connection_type":"to_be_specified","note":"placeholder for downstream consumer or export sink"}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"confidence":0.75,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]},{"kind":"candidate_edit","title":"标记 Trim Separator 压力模式为受约束状态","target":{"type":"unit","id":"separator-4","name":"Trim Separator"},"rationale":"由于 vapor 出口悬空，separator-4 的 pressure_mode=free 在当前拓扑下无法正确求解。添加 parameter_updates 将 pressure_mode 临时标记为 constrained_pending_topology，提示求解器在拓扑修复前采用替代策略或跳过该单元平衡计算。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"pressure_mode":"constrained_pending_topology"}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"confidence":0.7,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-2","snapshot-1"]}],"citations":[{"id":"diag-1","type":"diagnostic","ref":"STREAM_DISCONNECTED"},{"id":"diag-2","type":"diagnostic","ref":"COOLER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED"},{"id":"diag-3","type":"diagnostic","ref":"DOWNSTREAM_SEPARATOR_STATE_DEPENDENT"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-2","type":"artifact","ref":"cooler-outlet-41"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-3","type":"artifact","ref":"separator-vapor-41"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-2","type":"artifact","ref":"separator-4"},{"id":"snapshot-1","type":"snapshot","ref":"latest_snapshot"}],"requires_confirmation":true}

response.summary: 针对 Trim Separator (separator-4) 的 vapor 出口流 separator-vapor-41 未连接下游消费端的问题，生成局部占位修复提案，同时保留 Cooler 与 Separator 之间的关联约束作为上下文提示。

answers.text: 检测到 separator-vapor-41 存在未连接下游的严重拓扑错误，已为其生成占位连接提案；同时识别到 cooler-outlet-41 与 separator-4 存在跨对象状态依赖警告，建议在修复拓扑后复核 Cooler 出口条件。

issues.message: Separator Vapor Outlet 未连接任何下游消费端或出口汇点
Trim Cooler 出口条件可能在下游恢复后发生变化
Trim Separator 在 vapor 出口未连接时无法视为独立稳定

proposed_actions.title: 为 Separator Vapor Outlet 添加下游占位连接
proposed_actions.rationale: separator-vapor-41 当前为悬空流，导致求解器拓扑无效。添加 connection_placeholder 标记待连接下游单元，保留现有压力规格 (146 kPa) 作为边界条件占位，待后续指定具体消费单元或汇点后完成拓扑闭合。
